scripts.build:wa-sqlite: pnpm run build:vendor:wa-sqlite && pnpm -C .. run build:ts
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm -C ../../treecrdt-benchmark run build && pnpm -C ../../sync-protocol/protocol run build && pnpm -C ../../sync-protocol/material/sqlite run build && pnpm -C ../../treecrdt-engine-conformance run build && pnpm run build:wa-sqlite && playwright test
scripts.bench: pnpm -C ../../treecrdt-benchmark run build && pnpm run build && playwright test tests/bench-opfs.spec.ts tests/bench-sync.spec.ts --reporter=line
